description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% polyester, has a mesh lining made of 100% polyester, two insert pockets on the sides, drawstring waist with a black drawstring on the inside, embroidered brand logo on the right hem and logo tab on the side of right pocketFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm waterDo not bleachTumble dry at lowCool ironDo not drycleanClose all fasteningsWash and iron inside outWash with similar coloursUse detergent for coloursLook good and stay comfortable this summer in these black shorts from puma. The embroidered cat logo on the left leg makes this a really cool pair. Team this with a white or black tee and performance shoes for workouts.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers size M, length of 40", Height 6”, Waist 32”
